headline: Ford Aluminum Supply Restarts Support F-150 Output And Valuation Upside
summary: Novelis has restarted operations at its Oswego, New York aluminum plant after extended outages caused by two fires last year. The facility is a critical supplier to Ford Motor (NYSE:F), particularly for aluminum used in F-Series trucks such as the F-150. Previous disruptions led to suspended production on several Ford models and an estimated loss of 100,000 trucks for 2025. With supply normalizing, Ford plans to accelerate output and aims to recover about half of the previously lost...
